title: Two special girls still waiting for their forever homes
description: GEORGE NEWS - Trixie has been with the...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Trixie has been with the Garden Route SPCA for far too long and we honestly cannot understand why.


> She’s clever, playful and absolutely overflowing with love. At around a year old, Trixie is at that perfect age where her personality is shining and she’s ready to become part of a family.


She would make a wonderful companion and a joyful addition to any home.


> Genevive is also around a year old and has completely stolen hearts. She will do just about anything for a tummy tickle and greets everyone with a constantly wagging tail.


Genevive has grown very close to her animal carer and thrives on affection, but she would truly love a home of her very own where she can soak up all the love she deserves.Both these girls are friendly, affectionate and ready to start the next chapter of their lives with someone special. Could that be you?Please consider adopting and giving one of these beautiful souls the second chance they’ve been waiting for.

Even sharing this post could help them find their forever homes.

For more information, or to adopt, please contact the SPCA on 044 874 4480, or visit them at their premises in Ossie Urban Road.

Trixie is at that perfect age where her personality is shining and she’s ready to become part of a family. Genevive has grown very close to her animal carer and thrives on affection, but she would truly love a home of her very own where she can soak up all the love she deserves.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
